_comment: USD per 1,000,000 tokens (input/output). Edit freely. Lookup in usage.mjs: exact model id first, then longest matching key-as-prefix (e.g. 'claude-opus-4' matches 'claude-opus-4-8'). Unknown model -> cost_usd stays null, never fabricated. Claude prices per platform.claude.com/docs/en/pricing (cached 2026-06-24); codex/OpenAI model prices are NOT populated below (no verified source at hand) -- add rows here if/when known.
